summary: Two independent lines of evidence clear the JAX implicit w/ph acoustic solve (advance_w_wrf + calc_coef_w) of admitting the growing mode. The WRF-binary center-column numeric diff is deferred (build blocked, see wrf_em_quarter_ss_savepoints.json). The localized residual is in the large-step vertical momentum/buoyancy balance, NOT the implicit solve.

injected_mode_probe_amplitude_ratio_per_.interpretation: feeding pure (-1)^k w with zero forcing into advance_w_wrf DAMPS it (<1) for all epssm. The implicit operator + calc_coef_w tridiagonal are correctly damping the 2dz mode.

epssm_insensitivity.interpretation: max off-centering (epssm->1, backward Euler) barely changes growth -> energy source is outside the off-centered implicit solve.

implicit_solve_is_2dz_stable.source_match: calc_coef_w_wrf_coefficients (acoustic_wrf.py:648-686) == WRF module_small_step_em.F:624-649; advance_w_wrf off-centering (advance_w.py:230-432) == WRF :1341-1584, term-for-term; ph work-delta convention (prep.ph_work~0) == WRF :275-276 ph_2=ph_1-ph_2. No epssm/sign/metric bug found.

residual_localization.driver: once-per-RK-stage pg_buoy_w rw_tend (vertical PGF + buoyancy large-step forcing)

growth.structure: fixed (sign_alt const 0.075), amplitude-growing -> unstable normal mode of the large-step balance

residual_localization.forcing_profile_at_t3s: rw_tend ~ -115 m/s^2 uniform DOWNWARD against a smooth +2K warm blob with smooth grid_p_full; by t30s rw_tend has the multi-lobe vertical oscillation matching w (proofs/f7i/rwtend_profile_*.json)

advect_w_missing_from_rw_tend.wrf: module_em.F:1011-1059 advect_w writes rw_tend before :1362 pg_buoy_w adds

rhs_ph_ph_tend_never_computed.jax: ph_tend init 0, accumulate_ph_tend is a stub
rhs_ph_ph_tend_never_computed.tested_as_fix: NO (deferred; substantial operator, not speculatively added without WRF verification)

diffusion_top_damp_mismatch.tested: const_nu in {75,200,500} -> finite at 180s but ALL detonate before 500s; diffusion delays, does not remove the energy source

next_decision: Build the WRF em_quarter_ss binary (Option A/B in savepoints note) and diff center-column rw_tend = advect_w + pg_buoy_w and the in-solver c2a*alt*t_2ave term after IC+steps 1-3; that pinpoints the balance discretization error. Candidate fixes to verify against WRF: (1) advect_w into rw_tend, (2) rhs_ph ph_tend, (3) km_opt=2 diffusion at the WRF value.
